technologies.Python: Python is my primary programming language. I have hands-on experience with frameworks such as FastAPI, Django, Flask, and Streamlit. I also worked with PyTorch for machine learning projects. Most of my projects are built in Python, including my professional experience as a Python developer.
technologies.Web Development: My professional experience in web development is mainly based on Python frameworks. In personal projects, I work with JavaScript, React, HTML, and CSS. I also have experience using Node.js in selected projects.
technologies.DevOps: I have experience with various DevOps tools and technologies, primarily from professional work. I also explored tools like Terraform independently. I worked with databases for web applications, RAG systems, and caching solutions.
technologies.Other Technologies: In addition to my core stack, I worked with Java (Spring Boot), C# (.NET), and C/C++. Java and Spring Boot were mainly used in academic and project work, while C# was used in personal projects. I continuously explore new technologies and expand my skill set.

terminal.AboutMe:
Software Engineer focused on Python, backend systems, and AI. I enjoy building efficient and scalable solutions, working with data, and exploring machine learning. I value clean code, performance, and continuous learning, with a strong interest in automation and system optimization. 
Most of my work and projects are centered around Python, where I gained both practical and professional experience.

I don't limit myself to a single technology. I believe that understanding different parts of a system is essential for building better solutions and collaborating effectively within a team. This approach allows me to see the bigger picture and contribute across multiple areas of a project.

I am open to new opportunities and collaborations, including working with technologies that I am still developing skills in. I am highly motivated to learn, adapt, and continuously improve. If you'd like to learn more about my experience or work together, feel free to reach out.
terminal.Projects:
Collection of personal and academic projects, including AI-based image localization, sentiment analysis, and web applications. Most projects are built with Python, with additional work in React and modern web technologies.

A key project is a Hybrid Drone Localization System — an AI-based image localization system that identifies the position of a drone image within a larger satellite image using deep learning and computer vision techniques. The model processes both images, generates a similarity heatmap, and predicts the most probable location, including Top-5 candidate positions. The project includes a full pipeline: data preparation, training, evaluation, and inference.

Another project is a Python-based system designed to process and interpret user input in a structured and scalable way. It follows clean architecture principles, including modular design, adapters, and pre/post-processing pipelines, enabling efficient handling of real-time data. The system is designed to be easily extendable with features such as noise reduction, voice state analysis, and intelligent input interpretation.
